data.title: Tesla Talking To Chinese Suppliers For Elon Musk's Solar Project: Report
data.description: A solar project by Tesla is underway with the goal of generating 100 gigawatts of solar cells. Tesla's stock has fallen to six-month lows, with continued weekly losses. Reports suggest that Tesla is in discussions with Chinese suppliers for Elon Musk's solar venture.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Renner
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Helsinki, Finland, Kirsten Renner, a member of the Nordea Group Leadership Team, has acquired a total of 10,067 shares in Nordea Bank Abp. This acquisition was disclosed in compliance with the Market Abuse Regulation, under Article 19 of the EU Market rules.

data.title: FedEx Stock Flashes Buy Signal On Earnings. Why Wall Street Is On Board.
data.description: FedEx's revenue has increased significantly as the company is now earning more per package. This growth in revenue has led to a buy signal being flashed on FedEx stock due to its strong earnings report. Wall Street analysts are supportive of this positive trend and are backing FedEx's stock.

data.title: Planet Labs Scores Breakaway Gap On Results, These Space Stocks Fly
data.description: Planet Labs is prepared to announce a breakthrough following their recent results. Firefly Aerospace stock in the space industry has shown significant growth, while York Space Systems has experienced a notable increase as well. Planet Labs has made a substantial advancement in their results, with their breakthrough being reflected in the soaring stocks of Firefly Aerospace and York Space Systems.

data.title: Only $200 in the Budget? These Three High-Value Tools Can Still Help Refresh Your Home
data.description: In Houston on March 20, 2026, as per PRNewswire, the arrival of spring signifies the start of numerous home improvement tasks. These tasks range from minor repairs and painting to catching up on neglected yard work. Homeowners often face the dilemma of prioritizing these tasks and acquiring efficient tools to assist with them.

data.title: Mesirow Advises Gravis, a Portfolio Company of New Water Capital, L.P. on the Acquisition of Procon Pacific
data.description: Rick Weil, the Managing Director and Co-Head of Packaging, along with Chris Yike, the Director, led the transaction. Mesirow provided exclusive financial advice, showcasing their strong presence in the packaging sector. The deal took place in Chicago on March 20, 2026.

data.title: Molina Healthcare of Michigan and The MolinaCares Accord Donate $135,000 to Senior Centers to Pilot Programs Addressing Social Isolation
data.description: In Ann Arbor, Michigan, Molina Healthcare of Michigan and The MolinaCares Accord have generously contributed $135,000 to senior centers for launching programs focused on combating social isolation.

data.title: University of Phoenix researchers present studies on human-AI collaboration and AI-ready healthcare curriculum at AECT 2026 Online Conference
data.description: Scholars from the College of Doctoral Studies and CEITR at the University of Phoenix recently collaborated on research related to the interaction between humans and artificial intelligence (AI) in cognitive tasks. This research, presented on March 20, 2026, in Phoenix, explores the readiness of healthcare professionals to effectively work alongside AI technologies. Key findings from the study were shared by the researchers, highlighting the importance of preparing healthcare professionals for the increasing integration of AI in their daily practices. Such collaboration was crucial to address the challenges and opportunities presented by AI in healthcare.

data.title: Riga to Host Northern Europe's Leading Deep Tech Conference "Deep Tech Atelier 2026"
data.description: Registration is currently available for the Deep Tech Atelier 2026, the premier conference for science-driven innovation in Northern Europe. Scheduled for May 14-15, 2026, in Riga, this event is in its eighth year and is expected to attract over 2,000 attendees from 60+ nations.

data.title: Forecast: Worldcoin projected at $0.28-$0.38 by April 2026. RSI at 35.64, potential rebound to $0.34-$0.38 if $0.30 holds.
data.description: Worldcoin is encountering technical challenges as its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 35.64 and its price is hovering close to the lower Bollinger Band levels. Analysts predict that Worldcoin may experience a potential rebound, with a projected price range of $0.34 to $0.38, provided that the support level at $0.30 remains intact.
